name: Auth Module Designer
description: Designs the authentication and authorisation system. Publishes session-types and user-roles contracts. The db-schema lane may HANDOFF to this lane when it needs role-enum definitions.

checks.prompt: Design the authentication module for the enterprise app: (1) authentication strategy (JWT/session), (2) user roles enum with at least 4 levels, (3) permission matrix for core resources, (4) session lifecycle (expiry, refresh). Be specific and implementable.
Generate TypeScript type definitions for the auth module: User interface, Role enum, Permission type, SessionPayload interface, AuthToken interface. Context: {retryContext}
